mapper.select: SELECT p.planner_id AS plannerId, COALESCE(p.custom_title, r.title) AS title, p.source_type_code AS source, p.term_code AS term, p.status_code AS status FROM sys_action_planner p LEFT JOIN sys_resource r ON r.resource_id = p.resource_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userSn} ORDER BY p.planner_id
SELECT competency_id FROM sys_competency_diagnosis WHERE user_id = #{userSn} ORDER BY created_at DESC, competency_id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_action_planner (user_id, diagnosis_id, resource_id, custom_title, source_type_code, term_code, status_code) VALUES (#{userSn}, #{diagnosisId}, #{req.resourceId}, #{req.customTitle}, #{req.source}, #{req.term}, 'TODO')
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_action_planner SET status_code = #{status} WHERE planner_id = #{plannerId}
mapper.select: SELECT resource_id AS resourceId, resource_type_code AS type, title, content, organization_name AS org, location, salary_min AS salaryMin, salary_max AS salaryMax, source_type_code AS sourceType FROM sys_resource ORDER BY resource_id
